_comments.purpose: Shared mapping and generation defaults for workbooks based on the IDTA submodel template set.
_comments.inheritance: Company configurations extend this file and provide company identity, input files, and asset identifiers.
_comments.templates: Template paths are relative to the configured reference directory and remain pinned to the tested IDTA revisions.

meaning.skip: Do not map rows whose actual Excel value is empty.
meaning.preserve-empty: Map the row and retain an explicitly empty AAS value with missing-value metadata.
meaning.dummy: Map the row using a type-appropriate dummy value and mark it as generated.

meaning.error: Stop the workbook when a mandatory template value has no usable Excel value.
meaning.dummy: Generate a type-appropriate dummy value and record that it was generated.
meaning.preserve-empty: Keep the mandatory AAS value empty and record missing-value metadata.

meaning.prune: Remove optional template branches that contain no mapped instance data.
meaning.keep-empty: Keep optional branches and apply the mandatory-value policy to their leaves.
meaning.dummy: Keep optional branches and generate dummy values for their required leaves.

meaning.always: Write mapping and review artifacts for every submodel.
meaning.issues-only: Write review artifacts only when mappings, dummies, or pruning need review.

meaning.detailed: Also emit unresolved rows, ambiguity information, and mandatory-value records.

_comments.review: Review artifacts and detailed logs are enabled so unresolved or ambiguous mappings remain auditable.
